description: ol-not-a-place (issue #113): reconciling #79's AST-only renderer, which dropped a nested Place argument (`:nums[1]`) and rendered infix operators in prefix form. With the fixture's source threaded into `check()`, the checker now slices the FULL target surface text verbatim from the source span for both a call whose argument is itself a postfixed Place (`count :nums[1]`) and an infix-operator target (`1 + 2`), matching what a learner actually typed.
